overall.description: First-person perspective footage from a survival video game showing a character walking through a dark forest at night. The player navigates a narrow dirt trail surrounded by dense trees and rocky terrain, with limited visibility illuminated by ambient light. A hand holding a wooden torch or stick becomes visible in the later frames.

agents.ego_description: walking cautiously along the narrow dirt path, navigating beside a rocky embankment on the right

entered.detail: steep rocky hillside covered with patches of grass and small plants
narrow winding trail covered with brown dirt and scattered leaves
tall dark tree trunks rising into the night sky
green leafy plants and shrubs lining the path edges

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk along a narrow dirt trail through a dark forest at night. A rocky embankment rises on the right side while dense underbrush and tall trees surround the path. The scene is dimly lit with low visibility, creating an atmospheric, enclosed feeling.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense forest interior with thick vegetation

events.description: character's left hand holding a wooden torch or stick enters the frame from the left side

agents.ego_description: continuing through the denser section of forest with a wooden torch visible in the left hand

segments.scene_description: The path continues deeper into the forest where the rocky embankment gives way to denser vegetation on both sides. The tree canopy becomes thicker, blocking more of the sky. At around 20 seconds, the player's hand holding a wooden object becomes visible in the lower left corner as they proceed along the winding trail.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a dark, oppressive forest that grows increasingly enclosed as the path winds deeper into the wilderness. It begins with a walk along a narrow dirt trail flanked by a rocky embankment and dense underbrush under a dimly lit night sky. As the camera proceeds, the rocky terrain on the right gives way to thicker vegetation on both sides, while the overhead canopy closes in to further block the remaining light. The scene then shifts as a hand holding a wooden object enters the lower left frame, accompanying the movement along the winding trail. Finally, the environment becomes more claustrophobic, with the surrounding trees and foliage tightening around the path.
